mapper.select: SELECT id, name, phone, license_number, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM hire_date) * 1000 AS hire_date, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_driver ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, phone, license_number, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM hire_date) * 1000 AS hire_date, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_driver WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE hd_driver SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, license_number = #{licenseNumber}, hire_date = to_timestamp(#{hireDate} / 1000.0), status = #{status}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
